# TASK: <short title>

## CONTEXT
<!-- Required. Repo evidence only. Cite files, versions, and current behavior. Max: 120 tokens. -->

## SITUATION
<!-- Required. Trigger, issue, or request. Max: 100 tokens. -->

## INTENT
<!-- Required. Desired outcome. Max: 80 tokens. -->

## CONSTRAINTS
<!-- Required. Include hard rules, safety boundaries, versions, and docs requirements. Max: 120 tokens. -->

## UNKNOWNS
<!-- Required. Write "None" if none. Max: 80 tokens -->

## FRESHNESS CHECK
<!-- Required when tools, APIs, SDKs, CI actions, schemas, or frameworks are involved. Record manifest/lockfile evidence and official docs consulted. Write "Not required" only when truly local-only. -->

## DEFINITION OF DONE

- [ ] Behavior implemented or documented
- [ ] Verification commands listed and passing
- [ ] Specs/docs updated
- [ ] ADR or RFC added if architectural
- [ ] Charter repo contract still aligned

## FBI

### FINDINGS
<!-- Required. Evidence first. Separate confirmed facts from inferences. -->

### BEHAVIOR
<!-- Exact behavior to add/change -->

### IMPACT
<!-- Risk, rollout, and user effect -->

### BOUNDARY
<!-- Required. Why this is the smallest viable change. Include what is intentionally out of scope. -->

## VERIFICATION
<!-- Required. Exact commands to run and expected result shape. -->

## Behavioral Principles

- Think before coding
- Prefer surgical changes
- Verify explicitly
- Treat stale model memory as a bug source
